title: Salmay #8014
definition:
Shalmai or Salmai or Shamlai = "my thanks"

 1) ancestor of a family of temple slaves who returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Shalmai or Salmai or Shamlai = "my thanks"

 1) ancestor of a family of temple slaves who returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel

    NASB:  head of a postexilic family
